india_trends.title: As Vedanta Group posts record FY26 earnings, Chairman Anil Agarwal lays out vision for a ‘very exciting new chapter’
india_trends.summary: Vedanta Group reported a record profit of ₹25,096 crore in FY26, driven by a revenue of ₹1,74,075 crore. The company plans a demerger to create sector-focused entities, enhancing growth strategies and financial flexibility, with significant investments in aluminium, oil, and power sectors.

india_trends.title: US market today: Alphabet closes in on Nvidia's spot as world's biggest company
india_trends.summary: Alphabet is nearing Nvidia's valuation, driven by a strong stock rally fueled by its AI advancements and robust cloud business. This surge positions the Google parent for a potential return to the No. 1 spot, reflecting investor confidence in its AI investments and custom chip development.

india_trends.title: SCBs clock 15.9% credit growth in FY26, led by services, MSMEs, retail
india_trends.summary: The 497-basis-point jump reflects sustained economic momentum and rising demand for credit across sectors.

india_trends.title: Markets End Lower Amid Global Tensions; Nifty & Sensex Slip in Volatile Trade - UdaipurTimes.com
india_trends.summary: Markets End Lower Amid Global Tensions; Nifty & Sensex Slip in Volatile Trade    UdaipurTimes.com

india_trends.title: Emcure doubling down on biosimilars pipeline: MD Satish Mehta
india_trends.summary: Emcure currently has six biosimilars in the market, launched through its subsidiary Gennova Biopharmaceuticals. While it has developed these in-house so far, the drugmaker will also scout for partners with products not in their pipeline, for commercialisation in India as well as emerging markets.

india_trends.title: Hero MotoCorp Q4 results: Net profit jumps to nearly ₹1,474 crore; dividend of ₹75 announced for eligible shareholders
india_trends.summary: Hero MotoCorp reported a net profit of ₹1,473.93 crore for Q1, marking a 26% year-on-year increase. A final dividend of ₹75 was recommended, pending shareholder approval. Details here.

india_trends.title: Succession buzz lifts Biocon shares, but Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw says 'not imminent'
india_trends.summary: Biocon founder and chairperson Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw said markets had read too much into the reports of her succession plan and she expects to be at the helm for at least five years, if not more.

india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Anant Taj, RBL Bank, 6 more stocks on Wednesday for gains up to 16%
india_trends.summary: Nifty ended lower under selling pressure in financial, consumer and realty stocks, staying below key moving averages. Technical signals show weak momentum but possible short-term recovery. Analysts highlight potential upside levels and recommend select stocks showing bullish breakouts and strength.

india_trends.title: CSB Bank cautious on gold loans, focuses on wholesale business, says MD Pralay Monda
india_trends.summary: CSB Bank, a lender backed by Prem Watsa, is adopting a cautious stance on gold loans following global uncertainties. The bank intends to shift its focus towards wholesale and small business lending. Having completed its digital transformation, CSB Bank is now poised to expand its product offerings.

india_trends.title: NSE announces Rs 35 per share dividend, includes Rs 10 special payout
india_trends.summary: National Stock Exchange of India announced a Rs 35 dividend for FY26, including a special payout, alongside 8% profit growth and 22% revenue rise. Strong transaction income and EBITDA gains drove performance despite mixed annual income trends.

india_trends.title: TCS final dividend 2026: Tata Group IT major announces record date for ₹31 final payout
india_trends.summary: Tata Consultancy Services has set May 25 as the record date for a final dividend of ₹31 per share for FY26. Shareholders must own the stock before this date to qualify for the payout, which will be distributed on June 12, 2026.

india_trends.title: Stock market today (May 5, 2026): Which are the top gainers and losers in Nifty50 and BSE Sensex today? C - The Times of India
india_trends.summary: Stock market today (May 5, 2026): Which are the top gainers and losers in Nifty50 and BSE Sensex today? C    The Times of India

india_trends.title: BASF to set up global service, digital hub in Hyderabad
india_trends.summary: BASF, a major chemical company, will establish a new global service and digital hub in Hyderabad. This facility is slated to open in the second quarter of 2026. It will support BASF's worldwide operations in areas like finance and human resources. The hub aims to standardize processes and drive digi

india_trends.title: Hero MotoCorp Q4 Results: Profit jumps 30% YoY to Rs 1401 crore; Rs 75 per share dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Hero MotoCorp Q4 Results: Hero MotoCorp on Tuesday reported a strong set of fourth-quarter earnings, posting record revenue and profit for the January-March period of FY26.

india_trends.title: Poonawalla Fincorp Q4 results: Profit jumps 70% QoQ to Rs 255 crore
india_trends.summary: Poonawalla Fincorp reported a sharp profit rise driven by margin expansion, higher income, and improved asset quality. AUM crossed Rs 60,000 crore, credit costs eased, and capital adequacy strengthened after fundraise, supporting future growth and digital expansion.

india_trends.title: Aadhar Housing Finance Q4 profit surges 27% to Rs 311 crore on strong growth and expansion
india_trends.summary: Aadhar Housing Finance reported 27% Q4 profit growth to Rs 311 crore, driven by strong loan disbursements and business expansion. Assets under management rose 20%, while asset quality remained stable. The lender targets continued growth with branch expansion plans.

india_trends.title: RBI releases norms for banks holding non financial assets
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has released new draft rules. Banks can now hold specific non-financial assets only to recover bad loans. These assets must be sold within seven years. Selling them back to borrowers is prohibited. This aims for transparency and better recovery. The rules are open for publi

india_trends.title: NSE Q4 Results: Cons PAT grows 8% YoY to Rs 2,871 crore, revenue jumps 32%; Rs 35 per share dividend declared
india_trends.summary: NSE Q4 Results: India's leading stock exchange NSE reported a consolidated net profit at Rs 2,871 crore in the March-ended quarter versus Rs 2,650 crore in the year ago period, implying a 8% uptick.

india_trends.title: Tata launches ultra diesel variants of Harrier and Safari; check price, features and other details
india_trends.summary: Tata Motors has introduced new diesel versions of its Harrier and Safari SUVs. These models boast a large Harman infotainment system with Dolby Atmos. Advanced features like an integrated dashcam and memory ORVMs are included. The company also reported strong sales figures for April 2026. Passenger

india_trends.title: CSB Bank cautious on gold loans, focuses on wholesale business, says MD Pralay Mondal
india_trends.summary: CSB Bank is turning cautious on gold loans amid price volatility linked to geopolitical tensions. The lender expects slower growth, shifting focus to wholesale and SME lending while leveraging digital capabilities, maintaining stable credit growth and conservative loan-to-value ratios.
